name: BB:UBA : Access Denies
notes: This BB includes all of the access denied under the high-level category Access.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Access Denies on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following Access.Access Denied, Access.ACL Deny, Access.Database Action Denied, Access.Firewall Deny, Access.FTP Action Denied, Access.IPS Deny, Access.Misc Application Action Denied, Access.PII Access Denied, Access.Session Denied, Access.Unauthorized Access Attempt
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Access Denies on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Access.Access Denied, Access.ACL Deny, Access.Database Action Denied, Access.Firewall Deny, Access.FTP Action Denied, Access.IPS Deny, Access.Misc Application Action Denied, Access.PII Access Denied, Access.Session Denied, Access.Unauthorized Access Attempt
